product.name: ArBir 200
product.familyDescriptorPl: Dzianiny tkaninopodobne na odzież wierzchnią, także wodoodporne
product.familyDescriptorEn: Woven-like knits for outerwear, incl. water-repellent
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven like Knit Fabrics for Bodywarmers, Jackets and Raincoats
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric
descriptions: %100 polyester, 220 g/m², developed for jackets, raincoats and reflective strips base
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
220 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: specLine: High Visible, Woven Like Knit Fabric
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention...they shine more than other objects
matches.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and marketed as high visibility fabric for safety clothing.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Application list mentions Raincoat, Jacket, Parka but no explicit vehicle or transport worker use stated.
EN 13034 chemical protection standard present but no explicit welding or metallurgy use stated.
